# LDN/ai — London AI Ecosystem Map

> Interactive intelligence platform mapping 99+ AI companies, 20 investors, 67 key people, 128 connections, and 100 funding rounds across London's AI ecosystem. Built by Jie Xi.

## Key Pages

- [Interactive Map](https://londonai.network) — D3 graph with company/investor views, People panel, Insights
- [Ecosystem Guide](https://londonai.network/ecosystem/) — Complete guide to London's AI ecosystem in 2026
- [AI Unicorns](https://londonai.network/insights/unicorns.html) — Every billion-dollar AI company in London
- [Funding Analysis](https://londonai.network/insights/funding.html) — $37.2B in tracked funding, sector breakdown
- [Data Source Comparison](https://londonai.network/insights/compare.html) — LDN/ai vs Dealroom vs Beauhurst
- [Sourcing API](https://londonai.network/sourcing) — Beta deal intelligence API for VCs

## Company Profiles

- [Google DeepMind](https://londonai.network/company/deepmind.html)
- [Wayve](https://londonai.network/company/wayve.html)
- [nScale](https://londonai.network/company/nscale.html)
- [ElevenLabs](https://londonai.network/company/elevenlabs.html)
- [Synthesia](https://londonai.network/company/synthesia.html)
- [Helsing](https://londonai.network/company/helsing.html)
- [Darktrace](https://londonai.network/company/darktrace.html)
- [Isomorphic Labs](https://londonai.network/company/isomorphic.html)
- [Holistic AI](https://londonai.network/company/holistic-ai.html)
- [Conjecture](https://londonai.network/company/conjecture.html)

## Public API (Free, JSON)

Base: https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api

- [Companies](https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api?resource=companies)
- [People](https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api?resource=people)
- [Funding Rounds](https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api?resource=funding_rounds)
- [Sector Insights](https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api?resource=insights)
- [Edges/Connections](https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api?resource=edges)
- [Stats](https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api?resource=stats)
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://ripugedrbnmvbbdntxgt.supabase.co/functions/v1/api?resource=openapi)

## Data

- 74 AI companies across 10 categories
- 20 investors (Balderton, Index, Accel, Lightspeed, Atomico, LocalGlobe, Seedcamp, MMC, GV, a16z)
- 67 verified people (founders, C-suite, VC partners)
- 100 funding rounds ($37.2B+)
- 128 graph edges (investment, partnership, talent, spinoff)
- 59 Companies House records
- 7 sector analyses (Health, Defence, Safety, DevTools, Autonomous, Fintech, Generative)
- Weekly automated updates (hiring, GitHub, CH filings, news)

## About

Built by Jie Xi (Executive Director, JPMorgan Strategic Investments). Open source: github.com/jxi5410/AI.LDN. Contact: jxi5410@gmail.com.
